items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Cough…

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: I'm fine. Just a bit careless to be attacked by those minions. Not a big deal. I scared them off effortlessly.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: What's with that look! Seems like it's time for your first lesson as my apprentice.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Rule Number One for "TD Hunter"—"Never look down upon minions!"

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Even weaker enemies can cause unexpected trouble. Got it?

options.text: But you didn't seem to follow your own rule.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Ahem, I intentionally put myself in danger to teach you a lesson.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Alright, it's your loss not listening to me. I'm speaking from experience.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Good, remember my words. They'll be useful to you one day.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Bell-Borne Geochelone lives in the Gorges of Spirits, which is the source of the Qing River flowing through here. I can sense the state of a TD through the remaining frequency in the medium.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: I told you that only I can find the "Bell Spiriton," right? It's because Bell-Borne Geochelone emits a special frequency during specific periods, and only when defeating it during these periods can one get the "Bell Spiriton."

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: No matter how many times you defeat Bell-Borne Geochelone, as long as it's not the right timing, you can't get the "Bell Spiriton," and only my Resonance Ability can tell if it's the right timing.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: We're pretty lucky. There's a high chance we'll get the "Bell Spiriton" if we hunt Bell-Borne Geochelone now.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Plus, it seems that those from the Pioneer Association are planning to go to the Gorges of Spirits along the river.

options.text: I can see signs of someone camping here.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Seems like they're well-prepared. The Pioneer Association is really interested in Bell-Borne Geochelone.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: You wanna know? Curiosity is a good trait! The more you know about your enemy before a battle, the more confident you'll be.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Let's start from the question "how Tacet Discords are formed." Most people believe that they are born out of chaos, but there are some exceptions—some TDs seem to come from legends or even real history.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Legend has it that the ancient army in Huanglong used to sound a bronze bell in battle, inspiring soldiers to fight bravely and symbolizing the good wish of a triumphant return.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: One day, the bell ringer saved a turtle along the Qing River by accident. From then on, that turtle became an indispensable part of the soldiers, sharing their happiness and sorrow.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Before the fierce battle ended, the bell ringer died. However, the sound of the bell still echoed on the battlefield. It's said that the turtle was the one who sounded the bell.

options.text: The turtle carried on the duty of that bell ringer.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Yes, that's the story. Later, someone found a rusted ancient bell in the Gorges of Spirits, similar in style to the bronze bell the ancient army used.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Underneath that ancient bell was a giant turtle-shaped Tacet Discord. It witnessed the fierce war and bid farewell to the bell ringer and soldiers. These memories tied the heavy ancient bell to its back.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: But it's just a story. After all, no one knows if TDs have memories and emotions.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: No matter what happened in the past, this TD is now a hideous creature bringing nothing other than pain and torture to Huanglong.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: You don't need to show any mercy. If it really had emotions, it wouldn't want to be a creature destroying happiness and peace of people in Huanglong.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Rule Number Two for "TD Hunter"—"Never show mercy to Tacet Discords!"

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: The Pioneer Association should have left not long ago. Let's follow their traces and catch up quickly!

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Have you used the Scan function on the Terminal?

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Wonderful. Let's follow the path displayed on the Terminal and track them down.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: This is where having me as your master comes in handy. I can teach you everything you wanna know.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Turn on your Terminal and select the Scan function. You'll see a path displayed on the screen, and all you need to do is to follow it!

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Understand? Great, let's follow the path displayed on the Terminal and track them down.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: That sound…

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: It's a signal that Bell-Borne Geochelone is waking up.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Ugh… My head…

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Nothing, just a bit of a headache.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: (Darn, it's happening again. It feels like something in my memories is about to be awakened.)

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: The problem is, the traces left by the Pioneer Association members seem to disappear here…

options.text: We can follow the sound of the bell.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Right, they must be where the bell sound is. Let's go.

dialog.stepLabel: Lianfeng: "Hey! Wake up! Can you hear me!..."

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Hey! Wake up! Can you hear me!

items.speaker: Pioneer Association Squad Leader
items.text: Ugh, you are… those people at the teahouse?

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Enough talking. I'll check your injuries with my Forte.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: No major organ damage, but there are multiple fractures. Did you fight against Bell-Borne Geochelone?

items.speaker: Pioneer Association Squad Leader
items.text: Ha, it can't be called a fight. We're completely crushed.

items.speaker: Pioneer Association Squad Leader
items.text: You should leave. Though it's calm now, no one knows when it'll wake up again.

items.speaker: Pioneer Association Squad Leader
items.text: It's not an opponent you ordinary people can deal with.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Ordinary people? You've got us wrong. I'm Lianfeng, a professional "TD Hunter," and this is my top apprentice.

options.text: "Top apprentice"… You've only got one apprentice, okay?
Just leave it to me and my master!

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: You guys stay here and rest. Leave the rest to us.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: {PlayerName}, listen carefully to what I'm about to say.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Do you see the large bell in the center of the "Bell-Borne Ravine"? Ringing it will awaken Bell-Borne Geochelone.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Since it's giant, it moves and turns slowly, so we'd better…

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Staying away from it will only force us into corners with its massive body. It can also use icy breath and condense water into ice crystals for indiscriminate attacks.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Though it may seem crazy, it's actually safer to get as close to it as possible.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Yeah, getting close allows us to take advantage of its blind spots during its turns and attacks. Smart move.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Its four legs, head, and tail are all highly offensive weapons. Don't underestimate them.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Also, its weakness is the big bell on its back, but it's relatively high and not easy to attack under normal circumstances.

options.text: Unless we can find a way to make it fall…

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: You have a clear head, huh?

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Bell-Borne Geochelone's feet are covered in hard ice, protecting them from hard.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: However, it's also its weakness. Once the ice is shattered, Bell-Borne Geochelone will lose balance and fall down, which gives us a good chance to attack its most vulnerable point.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: I'll draw its attention, and you seize the chance to attack.

options.text: Won't that put you in danger?

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Tsk, are you underestimating a "TD Hunter"? Once you figure out its attack pattern, dodging is easy. That's how we took it down before.

options.text: We? I thought you defeated it on your own?

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: We... I... Ugh, my head...

options.text: Was there anyone else who fought Bell-Borne Geochelone with you?

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: (In my memory, there's a group of people fighting alongside me.)

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: (Who were they?)

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Ugh… my head hurts!

options.text: Don't push yourself too hard. You'd better take a rest in your condition.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: It's dangerous to confront Bell-Borne Geochelone on your own.

options.text: It'll be fine. Leave it all to me.

items.speaker: Lianfeng
items.text: Wait, {PlayerName}!!
